message:
fix(core): apply rustfmt formatting to block_on RuntimeWithIo construction

Clean up formatting in the block_on function in runtime.rs:

- Collapse multi-line RuntimeWithIo struct literal into single-line form
  since it only has two fields (runtime, io_driver), matching rustfmt's
  default line-length preference
- Remove trailing whitespace from inline comments on the None arguments
  passed to Cx::new (observability and entropy parameters), aligning
  the comments directly after the values

These are purely cosmetic changes with no behavioral impact — they bring
the file into full compliance with rustfmt defaults so that future
`cargo fmt` runs produce no diff.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
